title: oleander indica
intro: Oleander indica, also known as Nerium oleander, is a beautiful and toxic flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region, known for its fragrant, showy flowers and glossy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, derived from its leaves, stems, and flowers. The health benefits of oleander indica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Oleander indica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, but it is essential to note that the plant is highly toxic and should be handled with caution, and its preparations should be taken under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
